name: SPRIDEN
description: Name and ID information for all people: students, employees, vendors, etc.

queries.name: Find Name by ID
queries.description: Find a person's name by their ID.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_PIDM
columns.description: Internal unique identifier for the person/entity.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ID
columns.description: The Banner ID (e.g., N00112233).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_LAST_NAME
columns.description: Last name of the person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: First name of the person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_MI
columns.description: Middle name of the person. Can be initial.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND
columns.description: If null, this row is the most current record. If N, this row is a historic record.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ENTITY_IND
columns.description: This field identifies if the person is a Person (P), or non-person (C). Non-persons are usually vendors. Filtering on this = P is a good extra insurance step against non-persons in your query if only people are desired.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Activity record on the row.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_USER
columns.description: The user that most recently updated this record. Example: BERRESG

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ORIGIN
columns.description: The name of the data source or Banner Object that was used to update the record.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_LAST_NAME
columns.description: Last name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_last_name).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: First name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_first_name).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_MI
columns.description: MI name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_mi).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_LAST_NAME
columns.description: Last name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: First name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_NTYP_CODE
columns.description: Name type code, very often blank.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_USER
columns.description: Record create user, aka, the user ID which created the new record.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_DATE
columns.description: Record create date, aka, the day of creation for the new record. In Oracle-SQL date format (01-JAN-1999).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: Source of the data. More often than not BANNER.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_FDMN_CODE
columns.description: PII domain of the row. Almost always blank in my experience.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SURNAME_PREFIX
columns.description: Name tag preceding the last name/surname. (Van, Von, Mac, Darth, etc).

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: Immutable unique key for the event of a duplicate PIDM/ID.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_VERSION
columns.description: Lock token. For my rows, I have a 0 and a 1.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_USER_ID
columns.description: Also, the last user to update this row. Exact same thing as SPRIDEN_USER, just used less.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: Multi-entity processing code.
